name: Black Mage
description:
After a long and boring class at the Magic Academy of Caelid, your teachers hold you after class and tells you to head to the Royal Library to get a book that best fits your magic (Earth, Fire, Air, Water, Light, Darkness). It sounds boring so why not. The librarian probably an old coo- oh no she's HAAAAAWWWTTTT

Leave a review or smth, like it? Hate it? Tell me so I can care a little more.

Art is done by @miluyiart , go check them out
creator: Probe
